entities.name: VC Network Effect
entities.context: Observation that getting into one VC firm leads to referrals across their portfolio and to other VCs

entities.name: Portfolio Company Access
entities.context: Being recommended to a VC's portfolio companies ('port codes') as a distribution channel

entities.name: Category Leadership Strategy
entities.context: Need to be 'on the list' or partnered with the category leader to gain access

relationships.context: VC relationships unlock access to their portfolio companies
Partnering with category leader triggers the VC network spread
